description: FILE 2 OF 2. THE BASE BUILD. TUNGSTEN 9.43 SLS(28) -- the ONLY .mq4 you may work from. Supersedes every earlier .mq4 in files/from-chat. Carries four Claude audit passes: SLS(25) MA-fan trend consensus (Hurst demoted from master gate to one confirming voice; old veto measured at -2.6 discrimination, worse than a coin flip); SLS(26) IC significance shrinkage on g_RegimeIC AND g_RegimeICCcy; SLS(27) ART_CalibrateStructural learns emaDispTrend/emaSlopeTrend at p60/p30 per instrument, plus regime-8 hard gate and soft mirror both routed through g_ART.moveSig; SLS(28) mirror-regime IC pooling, ART moveSig clamp fix (old [0.003,0.02] floor sat at p96.6 on M5 and p30.9 on H4), and dead-branch resurrection (priceChange20>0.01 was p99.9, >0.017 was p100, priceChange50>0.02 was p100 -- IMPULSE_BREAK was unreachable). Structural parity verified: brace delta 0, paren delta identical to base. NOT YET COMPILE-VERIFIED -- that is your Stage 2 job. Verify everything; assume nothing.
